---
---

## Research Interests

- Personalized Medicine
- Reinforcement Learning
- Random Forests and Trees
- Survival Analysis
- Sufficient Dimension Reduction
- High-Dimensional Data
- Biomedical Applications: Sepsis, Food and Nutrition, Infectious Diseases, Cancer Genetics/Genomics

## Editorial Services

- AE, [ACM Transactions on Probabilistic Machine Learning](https://dl.acm.org/journal/topml) (2025 - )
- AE, [Journal of Computational and Graphical Statistics](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/ucgs20) (2024 - )
- AE, [Journal of the American Statistical Association](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/uasa20) (2023 - )
- AE, [Statistical Analysis and Data Mining](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/19321872) (2022 - 2023)
- Editorial board reviewer, [Journal of Machine Learning Research](https://jmlr.org/) (2020-)

## Funding Support

My research is supported by

![](images/funding.jpg)
